synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-1835 Oracle Linux 10 virt-v2v bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1835
description:
[2.8.1-16.0.1]
- Replaced bugzilla.oracle.com references [Orabug: 34202300]
- replaced upstream references [Orabug:34089586]

[1:2.8.1-16]
- Add --memsize and --smp options
  resolves: RHEL-139153

[1:2.8.1-15]
- v2v can't convert guest with multiple windows OS on rhel10
- Add runtime requires for nbdkit-1.44.1-3.el10_1
  resolves: RHEL-137304

[1:2.8.1-14]
- Remove cache=none
  resolves: RHEL-135750
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1835

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-1835.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
virt-v2v-2.8.1-16.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
virt-v2v-bash-completion-2.8.1-16.0.1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
virt-v2v-man-pages-ja-2.8.1-16.0.1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
virt-v2v-man-pages-uk-2.8.1-16.0.1.el10_1.noarch.rpm



SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/virt-v2v-2.8.1-16.0.1.el10_1.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2.8.1-16.0.1]
- Replaced bugzilla.oracle.com references [Orabug: 34202300]
- replaced upstream references [Orabug:34089586]

[1:2.8.1-16]
- Add --memsize and --smp options
  resolves: RHEL-139153

[1:2.8.1-15]
- v2v can't convert guest with multiple windows OS on rhel10
- Add runtime requires for nbdkit-1.44.1-3.el10_1
  resolves: RHEL-137304

[1:2.8.1-14]
- Remove cache=none
  resolves: RHEL-135750
